title: malus columbina
intro: Malus columbina, also known as the Bael fruit tree, is a deciduous tree native to the Himalayas and parts of Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique, apple-like fruit. The Malus columbina plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiviral properties, which help in treating various health issues. The health benefits of Malus columbina include its ability to aid in digestion, reduce fever, and provide relief from respiratory problems. Malus columbina is often prepared as an herbal tea, juice, or powder to harness its medicinal properties, making it a popular remedy in Ayurvedic and traditional medicine practices.
